title: lagoseris leontodontoides
intro: Lagoseris leontodontoides, also known as the alpine ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe, particularly in the Alps. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The alpine ragwort can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
